note: Curated PARTIAL seed of SAP's cloudification signals. Key = '<KIND>:<NAME>' (uppercase). state = released | not_released. An entry ABSENT from this map is treated as 'unknown' by the scanner (counted, never a blocker) -- replace with a full export of SAP's public cloudification repository for production coverage. See README.md.

FUNCTION:WS_UPLOAD.successor: No front-end file access in ABAP Cloud; move file handling to a released app service.

FUNCTION:WS_DOWNLOAD.successor: No front-end file access in ABAP Cloud; use a released output/app service.

FUNCTION:GUI_UPLOAD.successor: No front-end file access in ABAP Cloud.

FUNCTION:GUI_DOWNLOAD.successor: No front-end file access in ABAP Cloud.

FUNCTION:POPUP_TO_CONFIRM.successor: Dialog is a UI concern; handle in the Fiori/RAP layer.

FUNCTION:POPUP_TO_CONFIRM_STEP.successor: Dialog is a UI concern; handle in the Fiori/RAP layer.

FUNCTION:F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST.successor: Value help belongs in the CDS/Fiori layer.

FUNCTION:RFC_READ_TABLE.successor: Generic table read is not released; expose data via a released CDS view.

FUNCTION:BAPI_BUPA_CREATE_FROM_DATA.successor: Use the released Business Partner API (A_BusinessPartner / I_BusinessPartner).

FUNCTION:SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1.successor: Use released email/output APIs (CL_BCS is not cloud-released).

FUNCTION:CONVERT_OTF.successor: SAPscript/OTF is classic output; use released form/output management.

FUNCTION:ENQUEUE_E_TABLE.successor: Generic lock FM is not released; use a released lock object or RAP locking.

FUNCTION:GUI_DOWNLOAD_MULTIPLE.successor: No front-end file access in ABAP Cloud.

CLASS:CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES.successor: No front-end services in ABAP Cloud; process server-side.

CLASS:CL_GUI_ALV_GRID.successor: Classic ALV grid is a dynpro control; use a Fiori list report / CDS.

CLASS:CL_SALV_TABLE.successor: SALV renders to classic/list output; use a Fiori list report / CDS.

CLASS:CL_BCS.successor: Classic mail (BCS) is not released; use released output management.

CLASS:CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE.successor: Use XCO codepage/conversion classes (CL_ABAP_CONV_* replaced by XCO).

CLASS:CL_GUI_CFW.successor: Control framework is a dynpro concept; no ABAP Cloud equivalent.

TABLE:VBUK.successor: Status tables VBUK/VBUP are gone in S/4; use released sales-document CDS.

TABLE:VBUP.successor: Status tables VBUK/VBUP are gone in S/4; use released sales-document CDS.

TABLE:KNA1.successor: Read via released Business Partner CDS (I_Customer / I_BusinessPartner).

TABLE:LFA1.successor: Read via released Business Partner CDS (I_Supplier / I_BusinessPartner).

TABLE:USR02.successor: User master is not released for direct access in ABAP Cloud.
